# MCP Echo Server Edge Cases Test
# Tests edge cases and boundary conditions

# Build the echo server binary
go build -o mcp-echo-server .

# Test with very long message
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"$(printf 'A%.0s' {1..1000})"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test message with leading/trailing whitespace (should preserve it)
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"  message with spaces  "}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"  message with spaces  "'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test message with internal newlines
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"line1\nline2\nline3"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"line1\\nline2\\nline3"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test message with internal tabs
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"col1\tcol2\tcol3"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"col1\\tcol2\\tcol3"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test message with carriage returns
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"text\rwith\rcarriage\rreturns"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"text\\rwith\\rcarriage\\rreturns"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test message with backslashes
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"path\\to\\file\\name.txt"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"path\\\\to\\\\file\\\\name.txt"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test message with quotes
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"He said \"Hello world!\" to everyone"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"He said \\"Hello world!\\" to everyone"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test message with single quotes
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"It's a beautiful day, isn't it?"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"It'\''s a beautiful day, isn'\''t it?"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test message with mixed control characters
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"mixed\n\t\r\"control'chars"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"mixed\\n\\t\\r\\"control'\''chars"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test message with zero-width characters
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"word​invisible​spaces"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"word​invisible​spaces"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test with very large ID number
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":999999999}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"large ID test"}},"id":999999999}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"large ID test"'
stdout '"timestamp"'
stdout '"id":999999999'

# Test rapid consecutive calls
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"call1"}},"id":2}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"call2"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"call3"}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"call4"}},"id":5}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"call5"}},"id":6}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"call1"'
stdout '"echo":"call2"'
stdout '"echo":"call3"'
stdout '"echo":"call4"'
stdout '"echo":"call5"'
